signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Token Holders in April | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Token Holders in April | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana's $SOL token holders reached an all-time high of 166.9 million in April, a 12% increase since last October, making it the fourth-largest held L1 token behind BNB, ETH, and TRX; this lagging indicator has historically marked cycle bottoms followed by rallies, potentially signaling a rebound amid recent 7% price surge

signals.headline: Ark Invest Buys $75M in Solana Tokens (April 11) | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ark Invest Buys $75M in Solana Tokens (April 11) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ark Invest purchased 500,000 additional Solana tokens worth roughly $75 million on April 11, representing significant institutional confidence in Solana's growth potential in innovative blockchain technologies.[2]

signals.headline: Ethereum Hits $3,200 as Altcoins Rally (April Ongoing) | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Hits $3,200 as Altcoins Rally (April Ongoing) | YES | MED confidence**  
Ethereum reached $3,200 amid a hard altcoin rally in April, with daily active addresses jumping to 650,000 (highest since January) and TVL across ETH, SOL, Cardano hitting $180B (75% of DeFi outside BTC); supported by Fidelity's April 12 research on institutional interest.[2]

signals.headline: Solana Rocketed 10% from $135 to $150 This Week | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Rocketed 10% from $135 to $150 This Week | YES | MED confidence**  
Solana's price surged 10% from $135 to $150 this week due to growing DeFi adoption, including a new dApp (Solend) launched April 9 offering faster, cheaper transactions vs. Ethereum.[2]
